name: Sucrose Homogenization Buffer (Organelle Isolation)
nameCn: 蔗糖匀浆缓冲液（细胞器分离用）

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with KOH. Sucrose 250 mM is isotonic and stabilizes organelle membranes. For ER isolation: use 0.25 M sucrose; for dense-core vesicles: 0.32 M. Used as base buffer for step sucrose gradients (0.25 M / 0.86 M / 1.3 M / 2.0 M layered for ER/Golgi separation) or continuous gradient (0.25–2.0 M). Keep all solutions ice-cold throughout.
notes.zh: KOH 调 pH 至 7.4。250 mM 蔗糖等渗，稳定细胞器膜。内质网分离用 0.25 M 蔗糖；致密核心囊泡用 0.32 M。可作阶梯蔗糖梯度（0.25/0.86/1.3/2.0 M 分离 ER/Golgi）或连续梯度（0.25–2.0 M）的基础缓冲液。全程保持冰冷。

ref: Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.6.1; Bhatt et al. (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450
